purpose: Deterministic provisioning contract for creating tenant-scoped core, marketing, and research agent payloads from validated workspace artifacts.
deterministic_rules: Agent creation MUST hard-fail when ./specs/tenant_runtime_state_schema.v1.json is missing.
Agent creation MUST hard-fail when validated workspace config for tenant is missing or unreadable.
agent_id MUST be deterministic and equal to {tenant_id}-{agent_type}-agent.
No network calls are required or allowed for payload construction.

acceptance_tests.name: Schema dependency exists
acceptance_tests.expected_result: tenant_runtime_state_schema.v1.json exists before any builder returns output

acceptance_tests.name: Agent payload determinism
acceptance_tests.expected_result: same tenant input yields byte-identical output for each agent type

acceptance_tests.name: Workspace alignment
acceptance_tests.expected_result: output.workspace and output.workspace_path match validated workspace mapping
